attacking_style: Pure sprinter who excels with perfectly timed second accelerations in closing meters rather than early power. Demonstrates diesel engine capacity for multiple efforts within same finish.
team_tactics: Benefits from leadout support (Matthews noted) but willing to operate independently when tactical situation demands, including chasing threats to secondary objectives like jersey competitions.
terrain_preference: Flat, controlled sprint stages where peloton remains compressed. Crosswind days favor him as bunch nervousness prevents early splits while keeping speeds manageable for his finishing speed.
vulnerability: Forced to make energy-expensive chases mid-stage when defending classifications, compromising optimal sprint preparation. Relies on late acceleration rather than sustained power.
key_patterns: Second acceleration superiority: wins by timing late kick after rivals fade, evidenced twice (2023)
Strategic sacrifice: willingly compromises sprint positioning for jersey defense calculations when necessary (2023)
Profits from premature opponents: capitalizes when rivals launch too early, holding back for final meters
form_trajectory: positive: Won two Vuelta stages in 2023 including final stage, showing consistent sprint form and tactical maturity throughout three-week race
built_from: 2023 La Vuelta Ciclista a Espana Stage 21
